message:
feat(fusion,embed,rerank,storage): add circuit breaker, federated search, cached embedder, rerank pipeline, and document storage

Fusion layer resilience:
- circuit_breaker.rs (+216 lines): fault tolerance module implementing
  circuit breaker pattern with configurable failure thresholds, half-
  open probe intervals, and per-backend health tracking
- federated.rs (+178 lines): federated search capabilities for
  distributing queries across multiple index shards with result
  merging and timeout handling
- rrf.rs (+37 lines): Reciprocal Rank Fusion refinements
- searcher.rs (+5 lines): minor searcher integration updates

Embedding layer:
- cached_embedder.rs (+189 lines): LRU cache layer for embedding
  computations reducing model inference overhead for repeated or
  similar queries
- model_download.rs (+8 lines): model download adjustments

Reranking:
- pipeline.rs (+321 lines): new structured reranking pipeline with
  multi-stage scoring, feature extraction, and configurable reranker
  chain for quality-sensitive retrieval workflows

Storage:
- document.rs (+311 lines): document-centric storage abstractions
  providing typed document lifecycle management, metadata indexing,
  and efficient bulk operations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
